title: Update bd close with auto-close and cascade-aware unblocking
description:
Two changes to internal/cmd/close.go:

1. Integrate AutoCloseAncestors: after closing requested issues, call AutoCloseAncestors for each. Report auto-closed parents in text output. Read auto_close config flag.

2. Update findUnblockedDependents() to use IsEffectivelyBlocked: a dependent whose last direct blocker is closed might still be parent-blocked.

3. Update JSON output schemas per design doc: plain --json wraps in {closed:[...], auto_closed:[...]}. --continue adds auto_closed field. --suggest-next adds unblocked field. This is a breaking change for plain --json (array→object).

Update close_test.go. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'bd close' and 'Close Command JSON Schema Changes' sections.
close_reason: Integrated AutoCloseAncestors and cascade-aware findUnblockedDependents in bd close
